Protocols & Placement Guidelin... How to Use FlexBeam on Hips
How to Use FlexBeam on Hips If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your FlexBeam before proceeding. FlexBeam may help you with your body’s natural healing processes when it comes to issues with your hips. You can also use it as a support as you prepare your hips for exercise or demanding physical activities. FlexBeam may also improve the strength of your muscles on the upper legs and the hips. Session A could assist with healing recent hip issues. For these purposes, you should use Session B. Session B may be helpful for ongoing hip issues, as well. Ongoing hip issues are those that last more than a month. Recent ones are those that last less than 30 days. Session A for Hips Session A is to be used daily. The total duration is 20 minutes and it consists of two applications, 10 minutes each. Session B for Hips Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Session B requires an additional FlexBeam application. This means you’ll have to use INFRA (3) on both sides on your hip and then add another
10 minutes, but with FlexBeam placed on your back. Session B is to be used every other day. Buy now
